title: Open Lane to the King
setup: The d-file is empty all the way from your rook to the 8th rank, and Black's pawn shield has no escape window.
hint: Slide the rook to the open back rank — the {{f7}}, {{g7}}, {{h7}} pawn wall does the rest.
explanation:
## The Idea

A classic **back-rank mate**. The d-file is a clean highway and Black's king is suffocating behind his own pawns.

Play {{Rd8#}}.

Why is the king stuck?

- {{f8}} and the rest of the 8th rank — covered by the rook on d8
- {{f7}}, {{g7}}, {{h7}} — all occupied by Black pawns
- No piece can interpose on the d8-g8 line
- The king cannot capture: d8 is too far from g8

> **Takeaway:** Whenever you see your rook and the enemy king on the same back rank with the file open, count escape squares before anything else. One move often ends the game.
